mapper.select: SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS maintenanceLogId, ml.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ml.maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, mis.maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, ml.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, ml.maintenance_date AS maintenanceDate, ml.maintenance_score AS maintenanceScore, ml.eta_maint_delta AS etaMaintDelta, ml.maintenance_result AS maintenanceResult FROM maintenance_log ml INNER JOIN equipment e ON ml.equipment_id = e.equipment_id INNER JOIN maintenance_item_standard mis ON ml.maintenance_item_standard_id = mis.maintenance_item_standard_id WHERE ml.maintenance_log_id = #{maintenanceLogId}

SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS maintenanceLogId, ml.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ml.maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, mis.maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, ml.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, ml.maintenance_date AS maintenanceDate, ml.maintenance_score AS maintenanceScore, ml.eta_maint_delta AS etaMaintDelta, ml.maintenance_result AS maintenanceResult FROM maintenance_log ml INNER JOIN equipment e ON ml.equipment_id = e.equipment_id INNER JOIN maintenance_item_standard mis ON ml.maintenance_item_standard_id = mis.maintenance_item_standard_id WHERE ml.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY ml.maintenance_date DESC, ml.maintenance_log_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS maintenanceLogId, ml.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ml.maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, mis.maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, ml.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, ml.maintenance_date AS maintenanceDate, ml.maintenance_score AS maintenanceScore, ml.eta_maint_delta AS etaMaintDelta, ml.maintenance_result AS maintenanceResult FROM maintenance_log ml INNER JOIN equipment e ON ml.equipment_id = e.equipment_id INNER JOIN maintenance_item_standard mis ON ml.maintenance_item_standard_id = mis.maintenance_item_standard_id WHERE ml.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND ml.maintenance_date <= #{referenceDate} ORDER BY ml.maintenance_date DESC, ml.maintenance_log_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS maintenanceLogId, ml.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ml.maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, mis.maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, ml.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, ml.maintenance_date AS maintenanceDate, ml.maintenance_score AS maintenanceScore, ml.eta_maint_delta AS etaMaintDelta, ml.maintenance_result AS maintenanceResult FROM maintenance_log ml INNER JOIN equipment e ON ml.equipment_id = e.equipment_id INNER JOIN maintenance_item_standard mis ON ml.maintenance_item_standard_id = mis.maintenance_item_standard_id WHERE ml.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND ml.maintenance_date >= #{referenceDate} ORDER BY ml.maintenance_date ASC, ml.maintenance_log_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT ml.maintenance_log_id AS maintenanceLogId, ml.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ml.maintenance_item_standard_id AS maintenanceItemStandardId, mis.maintenance_item AS maintenanceItem, ml.maintenance_type AS maintenanceType, ml.maintenance_date AS maintenanceDate, ml.maintenance_score AS maintenanceScore, ml.eta_maint_delta AS etaMaintDelta, ml.maintenance_result AS maintenanceResult FROM maintenance_log ml INNER JOIN equipment e ON ml.equipment_id = e.equipment_id INNER JOIN maintenance_item_standard mis ON ml.maintenance_item_standard_id = mis.maintenance_item_standard_id WHERE ml.maintenance_result <> 'NORMAL' OR ml.maintenance_score IS NULL OR ml.eta_maint_delta IS NULL ORDER BY ml.maintenance_date DESC, ml.maintenance_log_id DESC
